stemHtml: Cleared to fly an RNAV offset with no specified limits, you experience a communication failure. What should you do?

options.a: Orbit in place while attempting to fix the communications.
options.b: Return to the flight plan route no later than the next significant point.
options.c: Deviate and try to contact an alternative ATC station.
options.d: Maintain last assigned speed and level for 10 minutes.
